studyName: International Consortium on the Genetics of Heroin Dependence

tables.description: Subject ID, age, sex, study, affection status, DSM-IV, cannabis, childhood trauma, cocaine, control group identifier, Fagerstrom, opioids, sedatives, and treatment of participants with or without heroin dependence and involved in the "A Genome-Wide Association Study of Heroin Dependence" project.

tables.description: Subject ID, consent group, subject source, source subject ID, and affection status of participants with or without heroin dependence and involved in the "A Genome-Wide Association Study of Heroin Dependence" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Affection status - assumes population controls are unaffected

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: POOLED_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Pooled subject ID

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject id within source

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject identification number; subject ID "1" combines subject IDs 289101, 264401, 354701, 353601, 296001, 312501

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source of subject with study name

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site where sample was obtained, genotyping center, and histological type of sample obtained from participants with or without heroin dependence and involved in the "A Genome-Wide Association Study of Heroin Dependence" project.

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: STIMULATION
variables.description: Treatment type applied

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, and sample use of participants with or without heroin dependence and involved in the "A Genome-Wide Association Study of Heroin Dependence" project.

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample identification number

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample Use

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject identification number
